title: Basic JavaScript Data Visualization
description: Write a function that demonstrates the core concepts of JavaScript Data Visualization. Focus on implementing Chart.js for charts correctly.

title: Intermediate JavaScript Data Visualization
description: Create a function that uses Chart.js for charts and D3.js data joins together. Handle edge cases and validate inputs.

title: Advanced JavaScript Data Visualization Project
description: Build a small application that applies Chart.js for charts, D3.js data joins, Canvas 2D API in a real-world scenario. Include error handling and input validation.

title: Debugging JavaScript Data Visualization
description: The following code has bugs related to Chart.js for charts. Find and fix them.

title: Refactoring JavaScript Data Visualization
description: Refactor the following code to use modern JavaScript patterns with Chart.js for charts and D3.js data joins.
